message:
fix(io,time): mark Lines completed on UTF-8 error, assert on poll-after-completion in TimeoutFuture

lines.rs: set completed=true when from_utf8 fails so subsequent
polls return None instead of re-reading from the same buffer and
producing duplicate or garbled lines.

timeout_future.rs: replace the soft error return on poll-after-completion
with a hard assert, matching the pattern established in HedgeFuture and
RetryFuture. A future polled after completion is a contract violation that
should surface immediately rather than silently returning stale errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
